nasb.text: to bring Queen Vashti before the king with her royal crown in order to display her beauty to the people and the princes, for she was beautiful.

esv.text: to bring Queen Vashti before the king with her royal crown, in order to show the peoples and the princes her beauty, for she was lovely to look at.

cnv.text: 去請王后瓦實提，戴著后冕到王面前，使眾人和大臣欣賞她的美麗；因為她的容貌很美。

ccb.text: 去请瓦实提王后戴着后冠到王面前，向百姓和官员展现她的美貌，因为她非常美丽。
